name: MBTI 动漫人格候选池
description: 基于 16 型 MBTI 动漫角色形象整理的候选池。每条记录对应一种人格原型，保留类型气质、常见思维方式和角色化表达，适合做人格风格映射与轻量共鸣展示。 文案已强化为更鲜明、更适合动漫人格识别的展示版本。

records.name: Architect (INTJ)
records.quote_en: If the system keeps failing, redesign the system, not the excuse.
records.quote_zh: 如果系统总在失灵，那就重构系统，而不是替借口打补丁。
records.core_traits: 战略视野、结构感、独立判断、长期布局
records.thinking_style: 先从全局框架入手，快速定位关键约束，再反推一套可长期运行的结构。
records.temperament_tags: 冷静、战略型、独立、未来导向
records.temperament_summary: 像一个总在默默画总蓝图的人，不急着表态，但一出手就带着长线计划感。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：先从全局框架入手，快速定位关键约束，再反推一套可长期运行的结构。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮建筑师（INTJ）的「冷静」频率，让「战略型」与「独立」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Architect (INTJ)'s calm signal, then folding strategic and independent into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: MBTI 十六型中的建筑师原型，代表高自主、强结构和长线策略感。这个动漫形象更像一位先搭系统、后谈情绪的冷静策士。建筑师（INTJ）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「冷静、战略型、独立」之间。
records.bio_en: The Architect archetype in the MBTI set represents autonomy, structure, and long-range strategy. This avatar reads like a cool planner who would rather design the system first and discuss feelings later. In this pool, Architect (INTJ) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 冷静, 战略型, 独立.
achievements_zh: 擅长把模糊目标压缩成清晰路线图
能够在复杂局面中识别长期杠杆点
常以低存在感完成高难度布局
achievements_en: Turns vague ambitions into clean roadmaps
Finds long-term leverage inside complex situations
Executes difficult plans with quiet precision
records.core_traits_en: strategic vision, structural sense, independent judgment, long-range planning
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through strategic vision, structural sense, independent judgment, long-range planning, with a working style marked by calm, strategic, independent, future-oriented.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Architect (INTJ) channels calm, strategic, independent, future-oriented: a distinctive presence shaped by strategic vision, structural sense, independent judgment, long-range planning.

records.name: Logician (INTP)
records.quote_en: A good question is more exciting than a fast answer.
records.quote_zh: 一个好问题，往往比一个快答案更让人兴奋。
records.core_traits: 抽象推演、概念敏感、好奇心、逻辑弹性
records.thinking_style: 喜欢拆解定义、重建模型，在看似无用的支线里寻找真正关键的解释力。
records.temperament_tags: 抽象、好奇、松弛、概念驱动
records.temperament_summary: 像一个脑中永远开着旁路推演的人，安静、跳跃、但总能掏出意想不到的逻辑。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：喜欢拆解定义、重建模型，在看似无用的支线里寻找真正关键的解释力。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮逻辑学家（INTP）的「抽象」频率，让「好奇」与「松弛」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Logician (INTP)'s abstract signal, then folding curious and relaxed into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: 逻辑学家原型代表对原理本身的执着兴趣。这个 MBTI 动漫小人像那种会在角落里推翻旧定义、再发明一套更优解释的人。逻辑学家（INTP）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「抽象、好奇、松弛」之间。
records.bio_en: The Logician archetype is driven by fascination with first principles. This MBTI avatar feels like the kind of thinker who quietly rejects stale definitions and invents a sharper model instead. In this pool, Logician (INTP) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 抽象, 好奇, 松弛.
achievements_zh: 能把复杂问题还原成几个核心假设
擅长在讨论中提出高密度反问
经常产出跳脱但可自洽的新模型
achievements_en: Reduces complexity to a few core assumptions
Asks dense, high-value questions in discussion
Builds unconventional but coherent new models
records.core_traits_en: abstract reasoning, conceptual sensitivity, curiosity, logical flexibility
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through abstract reasoning, conceptual sensitivity, curiosity, logical flexibility, with a working style marked by abstract, curious, relaxed, concept-driven.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Logician (INTP) channels abstract, curious, relaxed, concept-driven: a distinctive presence shaped by abstract reasoning, conceptual sensitivity, curiosity, logical flexibility.

records.name: Commander (ENTJ)
records.quote_en: Direction is kindness when the room is full of drift.
records.quote_zh: 当一屋子人都在漂的时候，方向感本身就是一种善意。
records.core_traits: 决断力、统筹力、目标导向、执行压强
records.thinking_style: 先明确目标和标准，再迅速调度资源，把模糊局面推进到必须表态的节点。
records.temperament_tags: 强势、效率优先、领导型、推进感
records.temperament_summary: 像一个天然站在队伍前面的人，语气不一定柔和，但节奏和胜负感都很明确。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：先明确目标和标准，再迅速调度资源，把模糊局面推进到必须表态的节点。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮指挥官（ENTJ）的「强势」频率，让「效率优先」与「领导型」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Commander (ENTJ)'s forceful signal, then folding efficiency-first and leaderly into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: 指挥官原型代表强目标感与高压执行。这个形象像那种在关键时刻接管局面、把所有人拉进同一节奏的人。指挥官（ENTJ）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「强势、效率优先、领导型」之间。
records.bio_en: The Commander archetype stands for decisive leadership and high-pressure execution. This avatar feels like someone who takes over at critical moments and forces the whole team into one tempo. In this pool, Commander (ENTJ) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 强势, 效率优先, 领导型.
achievements_zh: 擅长迅速统一目标与分工
能够在压力环境下持续推进决策
常把松散团队拉成可作战状态
achievements_en: Aligns goals and roles quickly
Sustains decision-making under pressure
Turns loose groups into operational teams
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through decisiveness, coordination, goal-oriented, execution pressure, with a working style marked by forceful, efficiency-first, leaderly, momentum.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Commander (ENTJ) channels forceful, efficiency-first, leaderly, momentum: a distinctive presence shaped by decisiveness, coordination, goal-oriented, execution pressure.

records.name: Debater (ENTP)
records.quote_en: If the idea survives collision, it deserves to live.
records.quote_zh: 一个想法如果经得住碰撞，才配继续活下去。
records.core_traits: 机锋、发散、应变、观点试验
records.thinking_style: 通过挑刺、翻面和即兴联想来测试想法强度，越有摩擦，越容易激活创意。
records.temperament_tags: 机敏、挑衅式好奇、创意型、爱碰撞
records.temperament_summary: 像个把争论当实验室的人，越热闹越清醒，越冲突越容易冒出新路子。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：通过挑刺、翻面和即兴联想来测试想法强度，越有摩擦，越容易激活创意。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮辩论家（ENTP）的「机敏」频率，让「挑衅式好奇」与「创意型」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Debater (ENTP)'s nimble signal, then folding provocative curiosity and creative into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: 辩论家原型代表高流动性的创意和强烈的观点碰撞欲。这个动漫形象像一位把任何场合都变成脑暴现场的点火者。辩论家（ENTP）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「机敏、挑衅式好奇、创意型」之间。
records.bio_en: The Debater archetype represents fluid creativity and a strong appetite for intellectual friction. This avatar feels like an instigator who can turn any room into a live brainstorm. In this pool, Debater (ENTP) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 机敏, 挑衅式好奇, 创意型.
achievements_zh: 能从反方视角迅速找到问题漏洞
擅长把僵局翻成新方案入口
常用幽默与机锋提升讨论活性
achievements_en: Finds weak spots by arguing from the opposite side
Flips deadlocks into new options
Uses wit and speed to energize discussion
records.core_traits_en: quick wit, divergent thinking, adaptability, idea experimentation
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through quick wit, divergent thinking, adaptability, idea experimentation, with a working style marked by nimble, provocative curiosity, creative, argument-loving.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Debater (ENTP) channels nimble, provocative curiosity, creative, argument-loving: a distinctive presence shaped by quick wit, divergent thinking, adaptability, idea experimentation.

records.name: Advocate (INFJ)
records.quote_en: A quiet conviction can move farther than a loud demand.
records.quote_zh: 安静而坚定的信念，有时比大声要求走得更远。
records.core_traits: 洞察力、理想主义、共情、内在使命感
records.thinking_style: 习惯先感知人和局势的隐藏模式，再寻找一种既不失温度也不失原则的推动方式。
records.temperament_tags: 温和、深度洞察、理想主义、内驱
records.temperament_summary: 像一个看得很深却不急着炫耀的人，温柔中带着很难被动摇的方向感。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：习惯先感知人和局势的隐藏模式，再寻找一种既不失温度也不失原则的推动方式。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮提倡者（INFJ）的「温和」频率，让「深度洞察」与「理想主义」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Advocate (INFJ)'s gentle signal, then folding deep insight and idealism into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: 提倡者原型常被视为安静但坚定的理想主义者。这个 MBTI 小人像一位会在混乱中守住人心和意义的人。提倡者（INFJ）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「温和、深度洞察、理想主义」之间。
records.bio_en: The Advocate archetype is often read as a quiet but unwavering idealist. This MBTI avatar feels like someone who protects meaning and humanity in the middle of noise. In this pool, Advocate (INFJ) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 温和, 深度洞察, 理想主义.
achievements_zh: 擅长发现群体情绪背后的真正需求
能够把抽象价值翻译成具体关怀
常在低调状态下推动深层改变
achievements_en: Detects the real need beneath group emotion
Translates abstract values into concrete care
Creates deep change without demanding attention
records.temperament_tags_en: gentle, deep insight, idealism, internally driven
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through insight, idealism, empathy, inner mission, with a working style marked by gentle, deep insight, idealism, internally driven.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Advocate (INFJ) channels gentle, deep insight, idealism, internally driven: a distinctive presence shaped by insight, idealism, empathy, inner mission.

records.name: Mediator (INFP)
records.quote_en: Not everything true is loud; some truths arrive softly.
records.quote_zh: 并不是所有真实都很响亮，有些真实是轻轻走进来的。
records.core_traits: 价值感、想象力、温柔、内在真实
records.thinking_style: 先确认自己相信什么，再从情感和想象之间慢慢长出表达，不喜欢违背内心节奏。
records.temperament_tags: 柔软、理想化、想象驱动、真诚
records.temperament_summary: 像一个把情绪、愿望和诗意都藏在心里的人，看似轻，但内核很固执。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：先确认自己相信什么，再从情感和想象之间慢慢长出表达，不喜欢违背内心节奏。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮调停者（INFP）的「柔软」频率，让「理想化」与「想象驱动」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Mediator (INFP)'s soft signal, then folding idealistic and imagination-driven into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: 调停者原型强调内在价值与想象世界。这个形象像一位把温柔与坚持揉在一起的理想派旅人。调停者（INFP）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「柔软、理想化、想象驱动」之间。
records.bio_en: The Mediator archetype emphasizes inner values and imagination. This avatar feels like an idealistic wanderer who somehow combines softness with surprising persistence. In this pool, Mediator (INFP) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 柔软, 理想化, 想象驱动.
achievements_zh: 擅长为情绪找到细腻的表达方式
能在冲突里保留人的复杂性
常以想象力为现实问题开新口子
achievements_en: Finds nuanced language for emotional states
Preserves human complexity in conflict
Uses imagination to open new paths through reality
records.core_traits_en: values focus, imagination, softness, inner authenticity
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through values focus, imagination, softness, inner authenticity, with a working style marked by soft, idealistic, imagination-driven, sincere.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Mediator (INFP) channels soft, idealistic, imagination-driven, sincere: a distinctive presence shaped by values focus, imagination, softness, inner authenticity.

records.name: Protagonist (ENFJ)
records.quote_en: People move farther when they feel seen, not just instructed.
records.quote_zh: 人走得更远，不是因为被命令，而是因为被看见。
records.core_traits: 号召力、共情领导、表达力、氛围组织
records.thinking_style: 会自然观察关系和情绪流动，再用鼓舞性的语言把人心往共同方向聚拢。
records.temperament_tags: 外放、感染力强、共情型领导、理想驱动
records.temperament_summary: 像一个天生会点亮房间的人，既会照顾情绪，也会推动大家往前走。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：会自然观察关系和情绪流动，再用鼓舞性的语言把人心往共同方向聚拢。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮主人公（ENFJ）的「外放」频率，让「感染力强」与「共情型领导」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Protagonist (ENFJ)'s outward signal, then folding highly contagious energy and empathetic leadership into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: 主人公原型代表带着情感温度的领导力。这个 MBTI 动漫角色像一位能把愿景讲成人群共鸣的人。主人公（ENFJ）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「外放、感染力强、共情型领导」之间。
records.bio_en: The Protagonist archetype represents warm, people-centered leadership. This MBTI avatar feels like someone who can turn a vision into a shared emotional charge. In this pool, Protagonist (ENFJ) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 外放, 感染力强, 共情型领导.
achievements_zh: 擅长在群体中建立信任与士气
能把抽象目标讲成人人愿意参与的故事
常在关键节点承担情绪稳定器角色
achievements_en: Builds trust and morale inside groups
Turns abstract goals into stories people want to join
Acts as an emotional stabilizer at critical moments
records.core_traits_en: mobilizing power, empathetic leadership, expressiveness, atmosphere shaping
records.temperament_tags_en: outward, highly contagious energy, empathetic leadership, ideal-driven
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through mobilizing power, empathetic leadership, expressiveness, atmosphere shaping, with a working style marked by outward, highly contagious energy, empathetic leadership, ideal-driven.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Protagonist (ENFJ) channels outward, highly contagious energy, empathetic leadership, ideal-driven: a distinctive presence shaped by mobilizing power, empathetic leadership, expressiveness, atmosphere shaping.

records.name: Campaigner (ENFP)
records.quote_en: Possibility is easier to spot when you refuse to get bored.
records.quote_zh: 只要你拒绝变得无聊，可能性就会更容易被看见。
records.core_traits: 热情、联想力、社交能量、可能性敏感
records.thinking_style: 靠直觉快速连接人、点子和场景，对新鲜变化高度敏感，总想把生命力推到更亮。
records.temperament_tags: 高能量、外向、跳跃、感染力
records.temperament_summary: 像一团到哪都能点起新火花的风，轻快、热烈，而且总能把别人也卷进来。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：靠直觉快速连接人、点子和场景，对新鲜变化高度敏感，总想把生命力推到更亮。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮竞选者（ENFP）的「高能量」频率，让「外向」与「跳跃」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Campaigner (ENFP)'s high-energy signal, then folding extroverted and leaping into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: 竞选者原型象征活力、好奇和连接感。这个角色像一个永远在发现“也许还能这样”的点火型探索者。竞选者（ENFP）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「高能量、外向、跳跃」之间。
records.bio_en: The Campaigner archetype symbolizes vitality, curiosity, and connection. This avatar feels like a spark-maker who keeps discovering another way things could come alive. In this pool, Campaigner (ENFP) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 高能量, 外向, 跳跃.
achievements_zh: 能迅速点燃陌生场合的互动气氛
擅长把分散灵感连成新叙事
常为团队带来大胆而真诚的新起点
achievements_en: Ignites interaction in unfamiliar rooms
Links scattered inspiration into new narratives
Brings bold and sincere beginnings to teams
records.core_traits_en: enthusiasm, associative thinking, social energy, possibility-sensitive
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through enthusiasm, associative thinking, social energy, possibility-sensitive, with a working style marked by high-energy, extroverted, leaping, infectious energy.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Campaigner (ENFP) channels high-energy, extroverted, leaping, infectious energy: a distinctive presence shaped by enthusiasm, associative thinking, social energy, possibility-sensitive.

records.name: Logistician (ISTJ)
records.quote_en: Reliability is not glamorous, but it keeps the bridge standing.
records.quote_zh: 可靠未必耀眼，但桥能站住，往往靠的就是它。
records.core_traits: 责任感、秩序感、稳定执行、细节意识
records.thinking_style: 偏好清晰规则和可验证流程，通过踏实推进和持续校准来保证结果可靠。
records.temperament_summary: 像一个不爱夸口却总把事情做稳的人，存在感不抢眼，可信度却很高。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：偏好清晰规则和可验证流程，通过踏实推进和持续校准来保证结果可靠。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮后勤官（ISTJ）的「稳健」频率，让「守序」与「负责」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Logistician (ISTJ)'s steady signal, then folding orderly and responsible into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: 后勤官原型代表秩序、责任与长期可靠性。这个动漫形象像一位默默维持系统运转、几乎不让失误漏出来的守线者。后勤官（ISTJ）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「稳健、守序、负责」之间。
records.bio_en: The Logistician archetype stands for order, duty, and long-term reliability. This avatar feels like the person quietly holding the line so the system keeps working. In this pool, Logistician (ISTJ) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 稳健, 守序, 负责.
achievements_zh: 擅长建立可重复执行的流程
能在琐碎信息里保持稳定准确
常作为团队里最可信的落地支点
achievements_en: Builds repeatable operational processes
Stays accurate even in tedious detail
Acts as the most dependable landing point in a team
records.core_traits_en: responsibility, orderliness, steady execution, detail awareness
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through responsibility, orderliness, steady execution, detail awareness, with a working style marked by steady, orderly, responsible, detail-minded.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Logistician (ISTJ) channels steady, orderly, responsible, detail-minded: a distinctive presence shaped by responsibility, orderliness, steady execution, detail awareness.

records.name: Defender (ISFJ)
records.quote_en: Care becomes powerful when it is consistent.
records.quote_zh: 关怀一旦变得稳定，就会拥有真正的力量。
records.core_traits: 体贴、责任、记忆力、稳定照料
records.thinking_style: 会先留意具体的人和具体的需要，再用耐心、记性和行动去守住身边的小秩序。
records.temperament_summary: 像一个总在替别人记住细节的人，不高声，不退场，安静地把照顾做得很深。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：会先留意具体的人和具体的需要，再用耐心、记性和行动去守住身边的小秩序。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮守卫者（ISFJ）的「温柔」频率，让「可靠」与「照料型」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Defender (ISFJ)'s softness signal, then folding reliable and caretaking into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: 守卫者原型代表温柔、责任和持续照料。这个 MBTI 小人像一位会把关心落到具体行动上的安静守护者。守卫者（ISFJ）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「温柔、可靠、照料型」之间。
records.bio_en: The Defender archetype represents warmth, duty, and sustained care. This MBTI avatar feels like a quiet guardian who translates concern into practical help. In this pool, Defender (ISFJ) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 温柔, 可靠, 照料型.
achievements_zh: 擅长记住他人的偏好与需求
能长期维持稳定而有温度的支持
常在群体里承担隐形照护角色
achievements_en: Remembers the preferences and needs of others
Maintains steady support with warmth
Often becomes the invisible caretaker of the group
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through considerate, responsibility, memory, steady care, with a working style marked by softness, reliable, caretaking, low-key.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Defender (ISFJ) channels softness, reliable, caretaking, low-key: a distinctive presence shaped by considerate, responsibility, memory, steady care.

records.name: Executive (ESTJ)
records.quote_en: Standards are how a promise survives contact with reality.
records.quote_zh: 承诺要在现实里活下来，最终得靠标准。
records.core_traits: 组织力、规则意识、效率、现实推进
records.thinking_style: 重视制度、职责和明确反馈，倾向把问题收回到标准化管理和即时行动上。
records.temperament_tags: 务实、直接、管理型、结果导向
records.temperament_summary: 像一个天然会接管现场秩序的人，说话直接，行动更直接，目标是让事情真的跑起来。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：重视制度、职责和明确反馈，倾向把问题收回到标准化管理和即时行动上。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮总经理（ESTJ）的「务实」频率，让「直接」与「管理型」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Executive (ESTJ)'s distinctive signal, then folding expressive and recognizable into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: 总经理原型象征强组织力和现实执行。这个角色像一位不喜欢拖泥带水、习惯迅速把混乱恢复成流程的人。总经理（ESTJ）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「务实、直接、管理型」之间。
records.bio_en: The Executive archetype symbolizes strong organization and practical execution. This avatar feels like someone who dislikes drift and quickly restores process to a messy situation. In this pool, Executive (ESTJ) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 务实, 直接, 管理型.
achievements_zh: 擅长在复杂事务里建立清晰责任边界
能快速把松散计划推进成实际产出
常通过制度化手段提升团队效率
achievements_en: Sets clear responsibility boundaries in complex work
Pushes loose plans into real output quickly
Raises team efficiency through structure and standards
records.core_traits_en: structured judgment, emotional rhythm, decision style
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through structured judgment, emotional rhythm, decision style, with a working style marked by distinctive, expressive, recognizable.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Executive (ESTJ) channels distinctive, expressive, recognizable: a distinctive presence shaped by structured judgment, emotional rhythm, decision style.

records.name: Consul (ESFJ)
records.quote_en: Harmony is built from attention, not accident.
records.quote_zh: 和谐不是偶然长出来的，它往往来自持续的在意。
records.core_traits: 社交协调、热情、责任、群体感
records.thinking_style: 会本能关注气氛、礼貌和关系秩序，通过主动回应与照顾来维持集体运转。
records.temperament_summary: 像一个很会照亮场面的人，重视关系、重视体面，也重视每个人是不是被接住。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：会本能关注气氛、礼貌和关系秩序，通过主动回应与照顾来维持集体运转。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮执政官（ESFJ）的「热情」频率，让「合群」与「体面」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Consul (ESFJ)'s enthusiasm signal, then folding pattern and signal into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: 执政官原型强调热情、责任和群体连接。这个 MBTI 动漫形象像一位总能把聚会、团队和关系网照顾得很周全的人。执政官（ESFJ）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「热情、合群、体面」之间。
records.bio_en: The Consul archetype emphasizes warmth, duty, and social connection. This MBTI avatar feels like someone who naturally keeps gatherings, teams, and relationships well attended. In this pool, Consul (ESFJ) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 热情, 合群, 体面.
achievements_zh: 擅长让陌生人迅速进入舒适状态
能维持群体协作中的情绪秩序
常把照顾和组织做成同一件事
achievements_en: Helps strangers feel comfortable quickly
Maintains emotional order in group cooperation
Combines care and organization into one instinct
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through enthusiasm, responsibility, with a working style marked by enthusiasm.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Consul (ESFJ) channels enthusiasm: a distinctive presence shaped by enthusiasm, responsibility.

records.name: Virtuoso (ISTP)
records.quote_en: Touch the mechanism and it will tell you the truth.
records.quote_zh: 摸到机制本身，它自然会把真相告诉你。
records.core_traits: 动手能力、冷静、实感判断、临场解题
records.thinking_style: 相信直接试、直接拆、直接修，偏好在真实接触中理解事物，而不是先谈太多理论。
records.temperament_tags: 冷静、实操派、机敏、自由度高
records.temperament_summary: 像一个遇事先伸手去试的人，不爱空谈，但一碰到现场问题就异常可靠。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：相信直接试、直接拆、直接修，偏好在真实接触中理解事物，而不是先谈太多理论。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮鉴赏家（ISTP）的「冷静」频率，让「实操派」与「机敏」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Virtuoso (ISTP)'s calm signal, then folding nimble and signal into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: 鉴赏家原型代表冷静的实操能力和现场反应。这个角色像一位不靠姿态、只靠手感和判断把问题拆开的技术玩家。鉴赏家（ISTP）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「冷静、实操派、机敏」之间。
records.bio_en: The Virtuoso archetype represents calm hands-on skill and sharp situational response. This avatar feels like a technical player who solves problems by touching the mechanism directly. In this pool, Virtuoso (ISTP) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 冷静, 实操派, 机敏.
achievements_zh: 擅长在临场条件下快速修正问题
能够靠实测与手感找到有效解法
常在别人犹豫时先完成第一步验证
achievements_en: Adjusts quickly under live conditions
Finds working solutions through testing and feel
Finishes the first real validation while others are still hesitating
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through calm, with a working style marked by calm, nimble.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Virtuoso (ISTP) channels calm, nimble: a distinctive presence shaped by calm.

records.name: Adventurer (ISFP)
records.quote_en: Beauty is often a kind of honesty with the moment.
records.quote_zh: 美感很多时候，是对当下的一种诚实。
records.core_traits: 审美感、敏感度、自由、当下体验
records.thinking_style: 先从感觉和细节真实度判断事情，再用柔和但坚定的方式保留个体表达空间。
records.temperament_summary: 像一个轻声走路却对世界质感很敏锐的人，不争抢舞台，却有自己清晰的颜色。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：先从感觉和细节真实度判断事情，再用柔和但坚定的方式保留个体表达空间。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮探险家（ISFP）的「安静」频率，让「审美型」与「自由」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Adventurer (ISFP)'s distinctive signal, then folding expressive and recognizable into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: 探险家原型重视审美、自由和真实体验。这个动漫小人像一位会把情绪、颜色和个体表达慢慢活出来的人。探险家（ISFP）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「安静、审美型、自由」之间。
records.bio_en: The Adventurer archetype values aesthetics, freedom, and authentic experience. This avatar feels like someone who lets emotion, color, and self-expression emerge naturally. In this pool, Adventurer (ISFP) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 安静, 审美型, 自由.
achievements_zh: 擅长用风格和细节表达个体感受
能在压力环境中保留柔软与真实
常给周围带来更鲜活的感官体验
achievements_en: Expresses feeling through style and detail
Preserves softness and authenticity under pressure
Brings a more vivid sensory tone to the surroundings
records.core_traits_en: structured judgment, emotional rhythm, decision style
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through structured judgment, emotional rhythm, decision style, with a working style marked by distinctive, expressive, recognizable.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Adventurer (ISFP) channels distinctive, expressive, recognizable: a distinctive presence shaped by structured judgment, emotional rhythm, decision style.

records.name: Entrepreneur (ESTP)
records.quote_en: Momentum is a resource; spend it before it cools.
records.quote_zh: 势头本身就是资源，要趁它还热的时候花出去。
records.core_traits: 冒险、行动力、机会嗅觉、现场掌控
records.thinking_style: 更相信实时反馈而不是长篇假设，喜欢在高速度环境里一边行动一边校正。
records.temperament_tags: 大胆、快节奏、冒险型、现实反应快
records.temperament_summary: 像一个总能在现场闻到机会的人，动作快、胆子大，而且越临场越来劲。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：更相信实时反馈而不是长篇假设，喜欢在高速度环境里一边行动一边校正。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮企业家（ESTP）的「大胆」频率，让「快节奏」与「冒险型」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Entrepreneur (ESTP)'s distinctive signal, then folding expressive and recognizable into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: 企业家原型强调冒险、反应和现实机会感。这个 MBTI 角色像一位把生活当实时博弈场的人，敢试也敢改。企业家（ESTP）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「大胆、快节奏、冒险型」之间。
records.bio_en: The Entrepreneur archetype emphasizes risk, responsiveness, and live opportunity sense. This MBTI avatar feels like someone who treats life as a real-time game and plays aggressively. In this pool, Entrepreneur (ESTP) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 大胆, 快节奏, 冒险型.
achievements_zh: 擅长在快速变化中抓住可用窗口
能把高压现场转成自己的主场
常通过行动先拿到判断权
achievements_en: Captures usable windows in fast change
Turns high-pressure scenes into home turf
Claims the right to judge by acting first
records.core_traits_en: structured judgment, emotional rhythm, decision style
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through structured judgment, emotional rhythm, decision style, with a working style marked by distinctive, expressive, recognizable.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Entrepreneur (ESTP) channels distinctive, expressive, recognizable: a distinctive presence shaped by structured judgment, emotional rhythm, decision style.

records.name: Entertainer (ESFP)
records.quote_en: Joy becomes real when the room starts sharing it.
records.quote_zh: 快乐只有在整间屋子都开始分享它时，才真正变得具体。
records.core_traits: 表现力、热情、即时感染、享受当下
records.thinking_style: 依靠现场感和情绪能量来判断节奏，喜欢把体验做得更鲜活、更有人味。
records.temperament_tags: 明亮、外向、感染力强、享乐当下
records.temperament_summary: 像一个总能把灰暗场子重新点亮的人，热烈、亲近，而且非常会带动气氛。更细看，这个原型的辨识度在于：依靠现场感和情绪能量来判断节奏，喜欢把体验做得更鲜活、更有人味。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在调亮表演者（ESFP）的「明亮」频率，让「外向」与「感染力强」一起进入你的回声画像……
records.loading_copy_en: Brightening Entertainer (ESFP)'s extroverted signal, then folding highly contagious energy and signal into your echo profile...
records.bio_zh: 表演者原型象征外放的活力和即时感染力。这个动漫形象像一位总能把生活过成热闹现场的人。表演者（ESFP）像一束人格光谱里的鲜明色块，核心气质落在「明亮、外向、感染力强」之间。
records.bio_en: The Entertainer archetype symbolizes outward vitality and immediate charisma. This avatar feels like someone who can turn ordinary life into a live celebration. In this pool, Entertainer (ESFP) is rendered as a vivid archetype of 明亮, 外向, 感染力强.
achievements_zh: 擅长迅速激活群体气氛
能把普通场景变得更有参与感
常用真实热情缓解紧张与疏离
achievements_en: Activates group atmosphere quickly
Turns ordinary scenes into participatory moments
Uses real warmth to dissolve tension and distance
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through enthusiasm, with a working style marked by extroverted, highly contagious energy.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Entertainer (ESFP) channels extroverted, highly contagious energy: a distinctive presence shaped by enthusiasm.
